channel.title: Silverlake on Gourmand Syndrome
channel.description: Recent content in Silverlake on Gourmand Syndrome

item.title: L & E Oyster Bar
item.description: I’ve been craving for seafood the last few weeks or months, and I didn’t feel like driving to Whittier to go to Portsmouth. I looked up Eater LA, and I found L&E Oyster Bar on their list of 2014 essential LA restaurants at #26. This is restaurant #1 for my 2014 LA food expedition. Note for 2022 migration: this is an old post from my other defunct blog. I recall back then this being a super hot spot in greater Los Angeles area.
